<div><b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 19px">Strategic Alignment:</span></b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">How well aligned do you feel our current business development strategies are with your sales goals?</span><b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></b></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">In what ways can we better align our efforts to ensure weŐre supporting the sales pipeline effectively?</span><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 19px">Understanding Their Needs and Challenges:</span></b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">Can you share some of the primary challenges your sales team is currently facing?</span><b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></b></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">How have our sales strategies evolved in the past year to adapt to market changes?</span><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 19px">Exploring Opportunities:</span></b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">Are there any untapped markets or customer segments that you believe we should explore?</span><b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></b></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">What are the key growth areas for your sales department this quarter/year?</span><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></li>
</ul>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></b></div>
<div><b><span style="font-size: 19px">Collaboration and Support:</span></b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></div>
<ul>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">How can business development support the sales team in achieving its targets?</span><b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></b></li>
<li><span style="font-size: 19px">Are there specific tools or resources that your team needs which we can help provide?</span><b><span style="font-size: 19px"><br></span></b></li>
</ul>
